The MSI MAG X870E Tomahawk WiFi is built for builders who demand more — more bandwidth, more speed, more headroom. Anchored by the AMD X870E chipset on the AM5 platform, it pairs seamlessly with Ryzen 9000 and 8000 series processors, delivering PCIe 5.0 connectivity, DDR5 memory support up to 8200+ MHz, and four M.2 slots including one Gen5 — so your storage is never the bottleneck.

Whether you're pushing frames in a competitive title, streaming 4K content, or running a heavy workload overnight, the X870E Tomahawk WiFi keeps pace. Wi-Fi 6E and 2.5G LAN ensure your network connection is as fast as your build. A robust power delivery system and premium audio via Realtek ALC4080 round out a board that's as capable as it is reliable.

Specifications

  • Socket: AM5
  • Chipset: AMD X870E
  • Form Factor: ATX
  • Memory: 4 × DDR5 DIMM, up to 256GB, Dual Channel
  • Memory Speed: Up to 8200+ MHz (OC)
  • PCIe x16 Slots: 2 (1 × PCIe 5.0 x16, 1 × PCIe 4.0 x16)
  • M.2 Slots: 4 (1 × PCIe 5.0 x4, 3 × PCIe 4.0 x4)
  • USB Rear I/O: 1 × USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 (20Gbps Type-C), 3 × USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10Gbps), 4 × USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5Gbps), 2 × USB 2.0
  • LAN: 2.5G Ethernet (Realtek)
  • Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax)
  • Bluetooth: 5.4
  • Audio: Realtek ALC4080 7.1 Surround
  • Power Connectors: 24-pin ATX + 2 × 8-pin EPS
  • Display Output: 1 × HDMI 2.1, 1 × USB-C (DP Alt Mode)

column3:
Build smarter. Build cooler. The Montech AIR 1000 Lite is engineered for builders who refuse to compromise on airflow without breaking the bank. With three pre-installed high-airflow fans and a mesh-forward design, every component inside breathes freely — keeping your system cool under pressure, whether you're deep in a gaming session or pushing a render overnight.

Its spacious mid-tower layout supports full ATX motherboards, 360mm front radiators, and GPUs up to 340mm — giving you the headroom to build the system you've always wanted. Clean cable routing, dual dust filters, and a tool-friendly interior make the AIR 1000 Lite a joy to work in, not just look at.

column3:
Unleash extreme gaming performance with the Sapphire Nitro+ B850A WiFi 7 motherboard. Designed with the signature high-performance industrial aesthetic of the Nitro+ series, this ATX board features the AMD B850 chipset and supports the latest AMD Ryzen 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors. A robust 12+2+1 power phase VRM with 55A Dr.MOS ensures stable power delivery for serious overclocking of both CPU and DDR5 memory up to 8000+ MT/s. It is fully future-proofed with a PCIe 5.0 x16 slot for graphics and an ultra-fast PCIe 5.0 M.2 slot for next-gen storage. Combining a superior cooling design, 2.5GbE LAN, and cutting-edge Wi-Fi 7 connectivity, the Nitro+ B850A WiFi 7 delivers a premium, high-value foundation for any enthusiast-grade AM5 gaming rig

  • AMD AM5 CPU SUPPORT
  • SAPPHIRE CORE BIOS
  • 12+2+1 Phase CPU Power, 55A Per Phase,
  • Robust VRM, M.2 and PCH Cooling
  • Dual Channel, 8000 MHz Memory OC
  • WIFI 7 Support
  • PCI Express 5.0 x16
  • PCIe 5.0 M.2 Support
  • Debug LED

The ASRock B650 LiveMixer is a feature-rich ATX motherboard designed for content creators, streamers, and power users utilizing the AMD AM5 platform. It fully supports the latest Ryzen 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors and is engineered for extreme stability with a powerful 14+2+1 Phase Power Design (SPS). Storage performance is maximized with a primary PCIe Gen 5 x4 Blazing M.2 slot and two additional Gen 4 M.2 slots, along with three PCIe 4.0 x16 slots for maximum expansion. Connectivity is the board's standout feature, boasting a massive 23 total USB ports (including a 20Gbps Front USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C) and a high-speed Dragon 2.5G LAN controller. This motherboard provides the ultimate foundation for a high-demand creative or streaming PC.

The ASRock B850 Riptide WiFi is a high-end Phantom Gaming ATX motherboard built for the ultimate performance on the AMD AM5 platform. Engineered to support the latest Ryzen 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors, this board is designed for enthusiasts and competitive gamers. It features a robust 14+2+1 power phase design with 80A Dr.MOS for superior power delivery and stability, even under extreme overclocking (DDR5 8000+ MT/s). Experience next-level speed with a primary PCIe 5.0 x16 slot and blazing-fast storage from four M.2 slots, including one PCIe Gen 5 x4 Blazing M.2. Connectivity is peerless, featuring a cutting-edge Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) module and a Killer 2.5G LAN port, ensuring lag-free gaming and lightning-fast data transfer.

Build your next-generation powerhouse with the MSI PRO B850M-P WIFI motherboard. Designed to support the latest AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series desktop processors, this Micro-ATX board features the high-performance AMD B850 chipset. It is engineered for lightning-fast speeds and professional-grade stability, offering a full PCIe 5.0 x16 slot for cutting-edge graphics cards and triple M.2 slots, including a blazing-fast PCIe 5.0 x4 interface for ultimate storage performance. Support for DDR5 memory up to 8200+ MT/s (OC) and a durable 6-layer PCB with 2oz thickened copper ensures superior performance and overclocking stability. With integrated Wi-Fi 7 and a powerful 5G LAN, the PRO B850M-P WIFI delivers an unrivaled, stable, and high-speed network experience for any demanding task.


Specifications

  • Socket / Chipset: AM5 / B850
  • CPU Support: AMD Ryzen 7000 / 8000 / 9000 Series
  • Memory: 4 × DDR5 DIMM slots, dual channel, supports overclocking
  • Expansion / PCI-E Slots: 1 × PCIe 4.0 x16 for graphics
  • M.2 Slots: 2 (both PCIe Gen4 x4)
  • SATA: 4 × SATA III (6 Gb/s) ports
  • Networking: WiFi7 + Ethernet LAN
  • USB / I/O: mix of USB 10 Gbps, USB 5 Gbps, USB 2.0 ports
  • Audio: 7.1-channel HD Audio (Realtek codec)

The MSI PRO B850M-A WiFi PZ is a high-performance Micro-ATX motherboard engineered for professional creators and power users utilizing the AMD Ryzen™ 9000 and 7000 Series processors on the AM5 platform. Built with a robust Direct 8+2+1 Duet Rail Power System and Extended Heatsink Design, this AMD B850 chipset motherboard supports blistering-fast DDR5 memory up to 8200+ MT/s (OC). column2: Gigabyte B850M Aorus Elite AX Ice
column3:
The Gigabyte B850M AORUS ELITE ICE is a micro-ATX AM5 motherboard with high-speed DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0 graphics slot, dual M.2 slots, and built-in WiFi 6E plus 2.5G LAN — perfect for gamers craving performance and a clean white “ICE” aesthetic.

 

Specifications

  • Socket: AMD Socket AM5
  • Chipset: AMD B850
  • Form Factor: Micro-ATX (mATX)
  • Brand: GIGABYTE / AORUS
  • CPU Support: AMD Ryzen™ 9000 / 8000 / 7000 Series Processors
  • RAM Type: Dual Channel DDR5
  • RAM Slots: 4
  • Max RAM Speed (OC): Up to 8200 MT/s
  • PCI-E x16: 1 Gen 5
  • Other Expansion Slots: 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4
  • M.2 Slots: 2
  • M.2 Slot Configuration: 1 Gen 5, 1 Gen 4
  • SATA Ports: 4 x SATA 6Gb/s
  • Ethernet: 1 x Realtek 2.5GbE LAN
  • WIFI Version: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax)
  • VRM Design: Digital Twin 12+2+2 Phases
  • USB Rear I/O: 1 x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C, 2 x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A, 5 x USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A, 4 x USB 2.0
  • Video Outputs: 1 x DisplayPort, 1 x Sensor Panel Link (HDMI)
  • DIY Features: PCIe EZ-Latch Plus, M.2 EZ-Latch Plus, Q-Flash Plus, Multi-key
